tr.td: 1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
Amlodipine (as amlodipine besylate) 2.5 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (2.5 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth once daily
Ferrous sulfate 325 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
1 tablet (325 mg) by mouth once daily
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product

ul.li: Achieve LDL cholesterol less than 2.6 mmol/L
Achieve total cholesterol less than 5.2 mmol/L
Achieve triglycerides less than 1.7 mmol/L
Achieve HDL cholesterol greater than 1.0 mmol/L
Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle modifications.
Patient will demonstrate understanding of dietary, exercise, and lifestyle changes to manage hypertension.
Maintain hemoglobin A1c below 5.7% through lifestyle modification and self-management.
Achieve and maintain a healthy body weight to reduce risk of diabetes progression.
Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle changes.
Maintain LDL cholesterol below 100 mg/dL to reduce cardiovascular risk.

tr.td: Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product

Aspartate aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
